title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Godrej Interio
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!
